# kemp_modify_url_rule (Resource)

System-level URL rewrite rule. Attach via `kemp_virtual_service_rule`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_modify_url_rule" "strip_v1_prefix" {
  name        = "strip-api-v1-prefix"
  pattern     = "^/api/v1/(.*)$"
  replacement = "/$1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `pattern` (String) URL pattern to match.
- `replacement` (String) Replacement URL/path.

### Optional

- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
